notes: This is a non-counting smoke recheck on an already release-facing QA-covered deployment. It validates availability, version drift, Cloud Run health, auth health, unauth monitoring protection, free-tier guardrails, and Vercel usage without adding live LLM prompt calls.
Current local HEAD includes QA evidence/archive commits after release d892f1fb, but production remains on release tag v8.12.58 as expected.
